search_document:
User Request: Best selling products.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Best Selling Products
Type: chart
Description: Sales volume of products over time
Title: Top Product Categories
Type: table
Description: Categories with the highest sales
Title: Total Units Sold
Type: kpi
Description: Overall units sold across all products

sql_queries.title: Best Selling Products
sql_queries.description: Sales volume of products over time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductName, strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS OrderMonth, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity FROM 'Order Details' od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID GROUP BY p.ProductName, OrderMonth ORDER BY OrderMonth, TotalQuantity DESC

sql_queries.title: Top Product Categories
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity FROM 'Order Details' od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Units Sold
sql_queries.description: Overall units sold across all products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(Quantity) AS TotalUnitsSold FROM 'Order Details'
